---
title: Slidebreak Example
format: 
  html:
    output-file: index.html
  revealjs: 
    output-file: example-slides.html
shortcodes:
  - _extensions/slidebreak/slidebreak.lua
---

[View as slides](example-slides.html){.btn .btn-primary}

## First Slide

Some content here.

{{< slidebreak >}}

more content after slide break (slide break is invisible in html format)

## Second Titled Slide

More content on a new slide.

## Third Titled Slide

And even more content on another new slide.
